parameters.jsonBody:
{

    "animation_duration": 90,
    "show_percentages": true

}

{
  "template": "stacked-area",
  "data": {
    "series_data": [
      {
        "name": "Product A",
        "values": [
          100,
          120,
          115,
          140,
          160,
          180
        ]
      },
      {

          80,
          90,
          100,
          120,
          110,
          130
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "Product C",
        "values": [
          60,
          70,
          80,
          90,
          100,
          110
        ]
      }
    ],
    "x_axis_labels": [
      "Jan",
      "Feb",
      "Mar",
      "Apr",
      "May",
      "Jun"
    ],
    "series_colors": [
      "#3B82F6",
      "#10B981",
      "#F59E0B"
    ],
    "stacking_type": "normal",
    "curve_type": "smooth",
    "show_legend": true,
    "animation_type": "wipe",
    "title_text": "Revenue by Product",
    "animation_duration": 90
  }
}
